name: Product
tagline: What to build, what to skip

coreMetrics.name: Feature Adoption Rate
coreMetrics.description: Percentage of users actively using a feature within 30 days of release

coreMetrics.name: Time to Value
coreMetrics.description: Time from user signup to first meaningful action or outcome

coreMetrics.name: NPS/CSAT
coreMetrics.description: Net Promoter Score or Customer Satisfaction Score from in-app surveys

coreMetrics.name: Sprint Velocity
coreMetrics.description: Story points or tasks completed per sprint cycle

weeklyRhythm.activity: User feedback review — scan support tickets, NPS comments, and feature requests
Roadmap check — confirm sprint progress, flag scope creep, adjust priorities

monthlyRhythm.deliverable: Top themes from user feedback and research sessions
Next month's release plan with scope and owners

whatToDelegate.when: When bug volume exceeds 10 per week
When you have a tagging framework established
